detaileddescription.para: T.R. Smith, J.P. Schlegel, T. Hibiki, M. Ishii, Mechanistic modeling of interfacial area transport in large diameter pipes, International Journal of Multiphase Flow, Volume 47, 2012, https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijmultiphaseflow.2012.06.009

memberdef.argsstring: (const DoubleTab &alpha, const DoubleTab &alpha_p, const DoubleTab &p, const DoubleTab &T, const DoubleTab &rho, const DoubleTab &nu, const DoubleTab &sigma, const double Dh, const DoubleTab &ndv, const DoubleTab &d_bulles, const DoubleTab &eps, const DoubleTab &k_turb, const int n_l, const int n_g1, const int n_g2, DoubleTab &coeff) const override
memberdef.name: coefficient_RC

memberdef.argsstring: (const DoubleTab &alpha, const DoubleTab &p, const DoubleTab &T, const DoubleTab &rho, const DoubleTab &nu, const DoubleTab &sigma, double Dh, const DoubleTab &ndv, const DoubleTab &d_bulles, const DoubleTab &eps, const DoubleTab &k_turb, const int n_l, const int n_g1, const int n_g2, DoubleTab &coeff) const override
memberdef.name: coefficient_WE

briefdescription.para: Donne des informations sur le type de l'Objet_U.

simplesect.para: (const Type_info*) structure regroupant les informations sur le type de l'Objet_U

briefdescription.para: Ecriture de l'objet sur un flot de sortie Methode a surcharger.
Lecture d'un Objet_U sur un flot d'entree Methode a surcharger.
